Los barcos no tripulados necesitan para su operación de forma segura de sistemas ópticos de alta resolución por lo que creemos que nuestra iniciativa puede encajar en los objetivos de SECPHO.

event_file: 'Conectando deep tech startups con inversores & corporates (Madrid)_2025-04-25_10-54'.xls
event_title_from_file: Conectando deep tech startups con inversores & corporates (Madrid)
comments: Hardwarriors es una consultora de Hardware 360 (controlamos desde el diseño hasta producción masiva de nuestros productos de Hardware y/o software asociado) y ahora también lanzamos al mercado productos con marca propia: control de accesos HLOCKY Y EGSY: el primer controlador de pantallas donde es la GPU la que controla directamente la pantalla H-LOCKY, encajado dentro de la domótica, se presenta como la primera tecnología para controlar tanto la cerradura como el telefonillo y el buzón de la vivienda desde una app móvil y dar accesos temporales, manteniendo las cerraduras existentes, autoinstalable por el usuario en 5 minutos reales y sin utilizar en ningún caso zonas comunes. Producto versátil y dirigido directamente al consumidor final y que estamos seguros tendrá una gran demanda, debido al cambio de hábitos de consumo y poblaciones La versión profesional está orientada a hoteles, centros de trabajo o comunidades, donde lo interesante no es sólo la apertura en sí, sino la monitorización del comportmaiento de nuestros clientes o empleados para poder mejorar en cualquier caso sus condiciones y mejorar la eficiencia del negocio (software siempre integrable al existente por medio de una API). Envío ambos dossieres, versión home y professional. Con los sistemas domóticos estamos empezando a integrar sensores tambien, tanto de seguridad: cámaras, apertura de puerta, vibración puerta, temperatura, luz... etc La tecnología EGSY se presenta como una solución integral para controladores de pantallas publicitarias. Hardware de innovación tecnológica (primeras pantallas controladas directamente por una GPU) que ahorra costes y energía tanto en el precio del propio Hardware, como en el del mantenimiento y actualizaciones. Y con la opción también de utilizar nuestro software centralizado en el usuario y que permitiría ahorrar costes de intermediarios. Gracias a la innovación en la tecnología, podemos además de rebajar costes, aumentar la seguridad (casi inhackeables al no llevar sistema operativo) y sobretodo agilizar contenidos y tiempos. Adjunto un link de youtube donde pueden ver en un minuto el resumen del producto los dos dossieres del producto y una pequeña presentación donde se ven más casos de uso. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Xmvx0AODpU

comments: Hola mi nombre es Francisco Teran, fundador de la start-up Nanotech Solutions creada en enero de 2019. Acabo de conocer su cluster y me gustaria saber como hacerme socio y cuanto supone la cuota anual para una empresa como la nuestra ( no figura en la web). a la espera de sus noticias, me despido gracias por adelantados Francisco Teran

event_title_from_file: Contacto
comments: Muy buenas estoy buscando una empresa que me pueda desarrollar y luego producir un pequeño sistema que permita tener una temperatura específica, identificar códigos QR, pueda tomar fotos cada cierto tiempo, interpretar los resultados de las fotos (serían cambios de color) y asociarlos a los códigos QR . No se si alguno de sus asociados podría hacerlo, si es así, les agradecería que me pusieran en contacto. Gracias.

event_title_from_file: Contacto
comments: Hola En la sesión de ayer sobre ética y deeptech fue imposible acceder al audio de la conferencia. Ni por Ipad ni por ordenador. ¿Hay algún enlace donde ver la sesión grabada? Gracias Joan Rosés

event_title_from_file: Contacto
comments: Buenos días, Estoy suscrita a los boletines informativos de sechpo y recibo los avisos de los webinar que se organizan. He visto que se organizó uno el pasado 21 de julio sobre Deep Tech para energía sostenible, al que lamentablemente no me pude suscribir por estar esos días en mi periodo vacacional. ¿Sería posible tener acceso, a la grabación del webinar o a las presentaciones?. Por otro lado, me gustaría saber si para participar como ponente es necesario estar asociado o se puede articular esa participación como una colaboración puntual en un webinar que este orientado a una temática en la que seamos expertos. Si este es el caso, ¿como podríamos saber que webinars tienen previsto realizar y para lo que podrían considerar nuestra participación? Muchas gracias. Un saludo, Oihana Ormazábal Oficina de Proyectos I+D Experto en programas de I+D www.cener.com

event_title_from_file: Contact
comments: To secpho, Greetings from Optics-2019!!! We cordially invite to collaborate with us (supporting partner) for our upcoming conference “World Congress on Lasers, Optics and Photonics” scheduled on September 23-25, 2019 at Barcelona, Spain. Our Organization is very much delighted to collaborate with you. Optics-2019 is offering a wide range of benefits to promote and expose your brand, product and services to the large number of audience. As the hardest problems of Optics, Lasers, Photonics and Physics can only be solved by the open collaboration of world-wide scientific community. In order to make conference successful, participation from great organization like yours is very much required. For event details By collaborating with us you can avail the following benefits: •	Display of logos on all event paraphernalia and areas around the event space as required. •	Access to our attendees & delegates •	Collaborators will get 25% discount on Conference registrations. •	Special Group discount to your members to attend the event. •	Opportunity to organize a workshop at any one of our events. •	Registered Organizations logo will be displayed in the respective conference webpage with a statement \"supported by\" •	Registered Organization for exhibition can organize a small symposium/exhibit a stall (Paid stall) with complimentary registration pass at the event Please do not hesitate to contact us. Yours Sincerely, Angelina McClain Event Manager

event_title_from_file: Contact
comments: \"Conference series cordially invites all participants across the globe to attend the 9th Euro Biosensors & Bioelectronics Congress (Euro Biosensors 2018) which is going to be held during November 29-30, 2018 Dublin,Ireland to share the Research and Innovations on Biosensing Technologies and Bionics. For more details visit- https://biosensors.conferenceseries.com/europe/ \"

event_title_from_file: Contact
comments: Dear Sir or Madam, I am from S3IC 2019 Organizing Committee and I am contacting you today because we would like this conference to be listed on your website. The conference website is: http://premc.org/conferences/s3ic-single-molecule-sensors-nanosystems/ This edition will be held in Munich and chaired by Prof. Frank Vollmer. We have succeeded in gathering an excellent group of Plenary speakers from different topics, so the conference should be very successful too. We could have a kind of media partnership, so we can display the logo of your company on the conference website. Looking forward to hearing from you. Best regards, Charif

event_title_from_file: Contact
comments: Dear Sir or Madam, I am a member of the ICREN 2019 Organizing Committee and I am contacting you today because we would like this conference to be listed on your website. The conference website is: https://premc.org/conferences/icren-renewable-energy/ The second edition of ICREN will be held in the heart of Paris at the UNESCO, in April 2019, and chaired by Prof. AbuBakr S. Bahaj. The program will be interactive and a great opportunity for participants to network. This edition will include 3 forums: Energy Access Forum, Energy and Cities Forum and Transitioning Supply Energy to Low Carbon as well as 3 special project events at the end of each day. We could implement a kind of media partnership and display the logo of your company on the conference website. Looking forward to hearing from you. Best regards, Charif

event_title_from_file: Contact
comments: Dear Sir or Madam, I am a member of the ICMF 2019 Organizing Committee and I am contacting you today because we would like this conference to be listed on your website. The conference website is: https://premc.org/conferences/icmf-magnetic-fluids/ This edition will be held in the center of Paris at the Paris-Sorbonne University and chaired by Prof. Christine Ménager, Prof. Régine Perzynski, and Dr. Pierre Levitz. The very international dimension of the Conference should lead to a great success, we have yet registered 3 plenary speakers with high-quality speeches. We could implement a kind of media partnership and display the logo of your company on the conference website. Looking forward to hearing from you. Best regards, Charif

event_title_from_file: Contact
comments: I would like to inform you that EuroSciCon is organizing a 2nd Euroscicon Conference on Nanotech & Nanobiotechnology 2019 which is scheduled during March 07-08, 2019 at Amsterdam, Netherlands. The theme of the conference is “Challenges and Innovations in next generation Nanoscience\". We are using this opportunity to invite you to the conference as a Speaker/Delegate/Media partner or Sponsor. Kindly let us know about your interest in participation at Nanotech and Nanobiotech 2019 Conference. For more information please visit: https://nanobiotechnology.euroscicon.com/ With Regards, Gracie Shaw Program Manager

event_title_from_file: Contact
comments: The“4th International Conference on Food and Beverages Packaging” (Food Packaging-2019) will be held at Barcelona, Spain on June 13-14, 2019. The theme of the conference is Optimizing Food Packaging with the Help of Recent Technologies . Food and beverage packaging conference mainly focus the important role played by packaging in maintaining the food quality, extending the shelf-life of food and reducing food waste. The conference focuses on Food and Beverage Packaging, Food Process Engineering, Food Analysis, Food Chemistry, Food Safety and Quality,Food Biotechnology and Nanotechnology, Material Science & technology, Food Package Testing, Baby Food Packaging, Sustainable Packaging , Food and Beverage Marketing, Frozen Food Packaging, Food Microbiology etc. https://foodpackaging.foodtechconferences.org/

event_title_from_file: Contact
comments: Dear Sergio, during my regular control of INDUSTRY 5.0 development I have found your webinar on ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE, which is promoted among others by the name of INDUSTRY 5.0 . My name is Michael Rada and I am the founder and the Father of INDUSTRY 5.0, which was born on December 1st, 2015 (https://medium.com/@michael.rada/industry-5-0-definition-6a2f9922dc48). I m confused why you used the name of INDUSTRY 5.0 if the content of your webinar doe does not reveal any speaker to talk about this topic, but maybe it was just a mistake and mistakes happen, If you would like to talk INDUSTRY 5.0 next time feel free to contact me, I can deliver the experience and point of founders view on five years of implementation in real business environment., you can even learn more from the INDUSTRY 5.0 KEYNOTE SPEECH - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M4BFPvJ9LWw I am looking forward to our cooperation MIchael Rada

comments: CAPACITY STATEMENT Description of the company: REGID International is a Biomass Energy and Geospatial Impact Development organization that provides technical expertise to support landscape restoration and climate mitigation activities of development iNGOs, governments and the private sector. We are keen on Spatial Analysis, Biomass energy and carbon business design to promote ecological sustainability. Three main thematic areas of focus by the organization: - Decentralized Biomass Energy: we improve power access through integrated food biomass energy systems with cutting edge CHP technologies for marginalized communities in the tropics. - Spatial analysis : with the aim to provide cost effective, easy to use and people centred tree monitoring frameworks to development agencies, governments and companies to influence landscape restoration programs across the globe. - Carbon modelling: we engineer solutions for climate mitigation through design and implementation of scalable, user-friendly methodologies for landscape carbon tracking for restoration programs at various scales. Commercial offer: The service offering consists of providing consulting and support services to iNGOs, governments, universities and development agencies through simplistic citizen science approaches to generate scientific data for impact quantification in climate mitigation. We are also keen in design of clean energy access and landscape carbon offset programs to effect the social capital of local communities in Africa. Company structure: Our service delivery package consists of team of advisory in our focal program areas coupled with technical experience from our President /Chief Technical officer. We have Engineers and a project manager tasked to ensure the realization of these services. The missions are coordinated by REGID International project manager and implemented by the team. Depending on the nature of the activity, the company may subcontract specialists for support services. Here is our Website: https://regid-international.org/
